description: 3D Visualization & Globe Features - Interactive 3D globe for global trading activity, trade path visualization, and 3D performance metrics

userStories.title: Create TradingGlobe component with Three.js
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see global trading activity on an interactive 3D globe.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize Three.js scene with React Three Fiber
Display trade markers on globe at market locations
Map volatility indices to coordinates (V10=Asia, V25=Europe, V50=Americas, etc)
Add orbit controls for camera manipulation
Verify in browser that globe renders correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented TradingGlobe component with all acceptance criteria met.

userStories.title: Implement trade path visualization
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see trade execution paths on the globe.
acceptanceCriteria: Add animated arc paths between trade locations
Show trade origin and destination points
Fade out old paths after 10 seconds
Verify in browser that paths animate correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented trade path visualization with all acceptance criteria met. Added TradePath interface, TradePathArc component with animated arc paths, origin/destination markers, volume-based line width, P&L color coding, gradual reveal animation, 10-second auto-fade, symbol filtering, and show/hide toggle.

userStories.title: Create market region indicators
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see which market regions are active.
acceptanceCriteria: Add region markers for V10, V25, V50, V75, V100
Color-code by volatility level (V10=blue, V25=green, V50=yellow, V75=orange, V100=red)
Add pulse animation for active regions
Show tooltip on hover with region details
Verify in browser that regions display correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented market region indicators with all acceptance criteria met. Added MarketRegion interface, MarketRegionIndicator component with volume pillars, active/inactive status display, height-based volume indicators, volatility-based color coding, pulse animations for active regions, detailed tooltips showing price/change/volume/trend, highlight on new trade support, and region integration into Scene component.

userStories.title: Add 3D performance metrics visualization
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to see system performance in 3D space.
acceptanceCriteria: Create 3D bar chart for performance metrics
Display metrics as 3D bars (return, Sharpe, max drawdown, win rate)
Create equity growth as 3D surface plot
Support rotation, zoom, pan for all 3D visualizations
Add export 3D scene as image button
Add view controls (reset, top, front, side)
Use React Three Fiber for rendering
Verify in browser that 3D charts render correctly
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented 3D performance metrics visualization with all acceptance criteria met. Created PerformanceMetrics3D component with 3D bar chart for performance metrics (return, Sharpe, max drawdown, win rate), 3D surface plot for equity growth, and 3D timeline for generation progression. Includes height labels on bars, color-coded bars by value (green=good, red=bad), rotation/zoom/pan support via OrbitControls, export 3D scene as image button, and view controls (reset, top, front, side). Uses React Three Fiber for rendering.

userStories.title: Implement interactive 3D charts
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to explore data in 3D space.
acceptanceCriteria: Create 3D scatter plot for feature analysis
Map features to X, Y, Z axes
Click to drill down to feature detail
Create 3D surface plot for optimization landscape
Display fitness function as height map
Add error state with fallback to 2D
Verify in browser that interactions work
